nodes.label: P2.2 synth — effective rank / Fisher (rising) / NCC across negative types
nodes.rationale: hard-proto's effective rank stays elevated (~42 flat) while random/oracle/unsup collapse toward ~8; but Fisher ratio and NCC for oracle/unsup keep RISING through depth (NCC up to ~0.62), the opposite pattern from CIFAR where Fisher rose but NCC still fell -- on synth the margin gain does convert into real class clustering.
